college.address: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur, Kalyanpur, Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh 208016, India

accreditation.notes: Separate institute-specific approval was not verified; statutory IIT applicability should be confirmed if required by the database.
No current institution/programme record was verified for this package.

admission_routes.admission_process: Qualify JEE Main eligibility for JEE Advanced, qualify JEE Advanced, register and fill choices through JoSAA, then complete allotment/reporting.
admission_routes.eligibility: Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics in Class XII; at least 75% aggregate (65% for SC/ST/PwD) or category-wise top 20 percentile, plus all JEE Advanced criteria.
admission_routes.foreign_national_route: JEE Advanced 2026 foreign-national/OCI-foreign rules; no separate management/NRI route recorded.
admission_routes.special_round: No CSAB Special Round for IIT seats.
admission_routes.branch_change_rule: Permitted once after the second semester in CPI order, subject to programme constraints stated in the JoSAA profile.

location.official_address: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur, Kalyanpur, Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh 208016, India
location.nearest_airport: Kanpur Airport (KNU); Lucknow International Airport is the major alternative
location.nearest_major_hospital: IIT Kanpur Health Centre (on campus); tertiary-care referrals require city hospitals
location.technology_ecosystem: IIT Kanpur SIIC, Research and Technology Park, institute laboratories and Kanpur industrial ecosystem
location.cost_of_living_band: Low-to-moderate relative to major metros; inferred, not an official figure
location.data_origin: Official address/transport plus map-derived coordinates and inferred cost band

senior_junior_culture.summary: Student discussions suggest approachable seniors and relatively open club participation, but evidence is limited and self-selected. No reliable college-wide claim about hierarchy or ragging is made.
positive_themes: Seniors may help enthusiastic students enter club activities
A current branch-specific counselling helpdesk connects applicants with students
negative_themes: Some club progression can require sustained time and visibility

academic_culture.summary: Official sources establish flexible degree options and extensive research facilities. Two recent graduate accounts describe both initial academic difficulty and meaningful research/course opportunities; workload and grading strictness cannot be generalised.
negative_themes: Adjustment and workload can be challenging

hostel_reality.summary: IIT Kanpur is residential with hall-based mess systems. Student media documented capacity pressure in 2023, while new hostel construction and changing intake mean current 2026 occupancy must be verified.
negative_themes: Mess experience is not independently rated

club_and_campus_life.summary: Official and student-associated sources show a large technical, cultural, sports and entrepreneurship ecosystem. Student reports indicate participation is possible without holding formal posts, although project quality and time demands vary.
negative_themes: Project outcomes and selection experiences vary
Recent activity was not individually verified for every club

coding_and_placement_culture.summary: Official placement reports show substantial software, core, finance, consulting and analytics participation, with structured SPO preparation. Public student-experience evidence about branch-wise access and placement transparency remains limited.
negative_themes: Company-role and branch eligibility data are incomplete
coding_and_placement_culture.evidence_strength: Official quantitative evidence with limited qualitative evidence

locality_and_student_life.summary: The large campus is separated from central Kanpur but now has direct metro connectivity to Kanpur Central. Campus services reduce dependence on the city; independent evidence on evening last-mile experience is limited.
positive_themes: On-campus health, clubs and essential services
locality_and_student_life.evidence_strength: Official connectivity evidence; limited student-reported evidence

overall_satisfaction.summary: Evidence supports strong academics, research, peer life and extracurricular breadth, alongside possible academic adjustment and historical hostel-capacity pressure. There is not enough representative evidence to state whether students generally would choose IIT Kanpur again.

parent_mode_summary.summary: IIT Kanpur offers a highly sourced admission and academic profile, a large residential campus, direct metro connectivity and substantial need-based support. Key family checks are the variable mess bill, current room sharing, scholarship confirmation and the final placement report.
parent_mode_summary.source_confidence: High for admissions, cutoffs, seat matrix and official fees; mixed for current hostel operations and student experience.

student_mode_summary.summary: The strongest fit is for students seeking rigorous academics, research flexibility, technical/cultural clubs and a broad placement ecosystem. Students should assess workload preferences, branch fit, residential life and the distance from central Kanpur.
student_mode_summary.source_confidence: Official programme and opportunity evidence is strong; qualitative experience evidence is limited.

data_gaps: Official 2026 JoSAA cutoffs are not yet available and have not been predicted as official.
Final 2024-25 and 2025-26 placement reports with package statistics, roles and company-wise selection counts are not public in a complete form.
The 2026 fee circular publishes approximate hostel MEC but not the variable food/mess bill.
Current first-year hostel sharing, exact capacity and allotment guarantee require DoSA confirmation.
AICTE, NAAC and programme-level NBA records were not verified; IIT Kanpur is a statutory Institute of National Importance.
Current scholarship deadlines and notified external-scheme institute lists need 2026-27 confirmation.
Recent dated activity was not independently verified for every club.
Campus-reality evidence is self-selected and insufficient for numeric ratings.
